tools.name: nova_canvas
tools.description: Generate images using Amazon Nova Canvas on Bedrock. Convert text prompts into high-quality images with configurable size and seed for reproducibility. Automatically saves generated images to user S3 storage.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate (required, max 1024 characters)

width.description: Image width in pixels (512, 768, or 1024, default: 512)

height.description: Image height in pixels (512, 768, or 1024, default: 512)

numberOfImages.description: Number of images to generate (1-5, default: 1)

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible generation (0-858993459, optional)

outputPath.description: Custom output filename (default: auto-generated with timestamp)
